configurations.name: 🚀 Development
configurations.command: . ./.env 2>/dev/null || true; DEV_HOST=${DEV_HOST:-127.0.0.1}; DEV_PHP_PORT=${DEV_PHP_PORT:-8000}; php -S "$DEV_HOST:$DEV_PHP_PORT" -t public kirby/router.php

configurations.name: 🏗️ Dev Build
configurations.command: . ./.env 2>/dev/null || true; DEV_HOST=${DEV_HOST:-127.0.0.1}; DEV_PHP_PORT=${DEV_PHP_PORT:-8000}; php -S "$DEV_HOST:$DEV_PHP_PORT" -t public kirby/router.php
